title: Data extraction form - A Systematic Literature Review on Prioritizing Software Test Cases using Markov Chains
author: Gerson Barbosa,  Érica Ferreira de Souza, Luciana Brasil Rebelo dos Santos,  Marlon da Silva, Juliana Marino Balera, Nandamudi Lankalapalli Vijaykumar
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: A data extraction form was created to gather all relevant data from the identified studies and manage the selection process in this systematic literature review. Some of the main information presented in this form was followed by a protocol, identifier (id) for each returned study, bibliographic reference, and answers to research questions. This catalog helps us in the data extraction and synthesis procedures and may be used by potentially interested, for example, for updating or replication.
